 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.40","title":"test(readme): pin DType + NullKind + CategoricalMetadata serde JSON shapes","description":"Sister to fd90.38/39. Three more documented serializable types lack literal-shape assertions:

- DType: unit-variant enum with #[serde(rename_all=snake_case)] → bare strings like "int64", "timedelta64"
- NullKind: same shape → "null", "na_n", "na_t"
- CategoricalMetadata: struct with categories: Vec<Scalar> + ordered: bool

Plan: add literal JSON assertions for each — protects against silent rename_all changes (would break the wire format that consumers depend on).","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-27T14:02:43.757892157Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-27T14:11:38.819270438Z","closed_at":"2026-04-27T14:11:38.817248298Z","close_reason":"completed: DType/NullKind/CategoricalMetadata shapes pinned","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.40","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-27T14:02:43.757892157Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.41","title":"test(readme): TypeError variant triggers (LossyFloatToInt / InvalidCast / IncompatibleDtypes)","description":"TypeError has 10+ variants but only IncompatibleDtypes is constructed (in compile guard). Real triggers via cast_scalar / common_dtype expose specific variants:

- LossyFloatToInt: cast_scalar(&Scalar::Float64(3.14), DType::Int64)
- InvalidBoolInt:  cast_scalar(&Scalar::Int64(2), DType::Bool) — must be 0 or 1
- InvalidBoolFloat: cast_scalar(&Scalar::Float64(0.5), DType::Bool)

Plan: add readme_typeerror_variant_triggers asserting each variant via cast_scalar with bad input + matches! pattern check. Lock in the contract that these specific failure modes route to specific error variants.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-27T14:12:46.943709410Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-27T14:21:40.566196315Z","closed_at":"2026-04-27T14:21:40.564161802Z","close_reason":"completed: TypeError variant triggers covered","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.41","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-27T14:12:46.943709410Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.42","title":"test(readme): IoError variant triggers (MissingHeaders/MissingIndexColumn/DuplicateColumnName/MissingUsecols)","description":"IoError has variants for specific CSV/JSON/Parquet/Excel failure modes. Several are mechanically triggerable from CSV input:

- MissingHeaders: empty CSV input
- MissingIndexColumn: CsvReadOptions.index_col=Some('absent') + valid CSV
- DuplicateColumnName: CSV with repeated header names
- MissingUsecols: CsvReadOptions.usecols=Some(['ghost'])

Plan: add readme_ioerror_variant_triggers asserting matches! on each error variant after attempting the bad read.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-27T14:22:30.964578781Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-27T14:31:38.461770984Z","closed_at":"2026-04-27T14:31:38.459584543Z","close_reason":"completed: 4 IoError variants triggered","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.42","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-27T14:22:30.964578781Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
-{"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.43","title":"test(readme): ExprError variant triggers (UnknownSeries / UnknownLocal / ParseError)","description":"ExprError has 5 variants (UnknownSeries, UnknownLocal, UnanchoredLiteral, UnanchoredLocal, ParseError) plus a transparent Frame wrapper. Triggerable from df.eval / df.query with malformed inputs:

- UnknownSeries: df.eval('nonexistent_col + 1')
- UnknownLocal: df.query_with_locals('@missing > 5', &empty_locals)
- ParseError: df.eval('1 + + 2') or similar syntax garbage

Plan: add readme_exprerror_variant_triggers asserting matches! on the specific variant for each bad expression.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-27T14:37:15.444034010Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-27T14:37:47.555624538Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.43","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-27T14:37:15.444034010Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.43","title":"test(readme): ExprError variant triggers (UnknownSeries / UnknownLocal / ParseError)","description":"ExprError has 5 variants (UnknownSeries, UnknownLocal, UnanchoredLiteral, UnanchoredLocal, ParseError) plus a transparent Frame wrapper. - UnknownSeries: df.eval('nonexistent_col + 1')
- UnknownLocal: df.query_with_locals('@missing > 5', &empty_locals)
- ParseError: df.eval('1 + + 2') or similar syntax garbage

 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.5","title":"fp-io SQL options chunks index_col helpers","description":"Child slice of frankenpandas-fd90: add chunked SQL read helpers that combine SqlReadOptions with index_col promotion for read_sql/read_sql_query paths. Reuse read_sql_chunks_with_options plus the indexed chunk wrapper, expose umbrella re-exports, and add focused fp-io tests for params/parse_dates/coerce_float with index_col, None behavior, and missing index_col validation.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"cod-pandas","created_at":"2026-04-25T08:09:51.139092537Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-25T08:16:06.447171200Z","closed_at":"2026-04-25T08:16:06.445331175Z","close_reason":"Completed in 48c06e1","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["io","parity","sql"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.5","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-25T08:09:51.139092537Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.6","title":"fp-io SQL table columns index_col helpers","description":"Child slice of frankenpandas-fd90: add read_sql_table_columns helpers that combine pandas-style columns projection with index_col promotion, including chunksize support. Reuse table/column validation and SqlIndexedChunkIterator, expose umbrella re-exports, and add focused fp-io tests for projection order, index promotion, None behavior, missing index_col validation, and invalid projection inputs.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"cod-pandas","created_at":"2026-04-25T08:17:53.092719400Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-25T08:23:29.256718983Z","closed_at":"2026-04-25T08:23:29.254823083Z","close_reason":"Completed in 49678e3","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["io","parity","sql"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.6","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-25T08:17:53.092719400Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.7","title":"fp-io SQL table options helpers","description":"Child slice of frankenpandas-fd90: add read_sql_table helpers that apply SqlReadOptions for table-name reads, including full-frame and chunksize variants. Reuse sql_select_all_query plus read_sql_with_options/read_sql_chunks_with_options, expose umbrella re-exports, and add focused fp-io tests for parse_dates/coerce_float table reads, chunked options, zero chunksize, and invalid table names.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"cod-pandas","created_at":"2026-04-25T08:25:11.840142268Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-25T08:30:59.564593046Z","closed_at":"2026-04-25T08:30:59.562092442Z","close_reason":"Completed in dd15e84","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["io","parity","sql"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.7","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-25T08:25:11.840142268Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
